title: Firelands United Women Make Club History in First Match
excerpt: Firelands United’s women’s first team made club history against Süsserfuss, taking the field for the first time as the club begins building a foundation for women’s soccer in the Firelands region.

title: Firelands United Opens 2026 Season with 2-2 Draw Against Fut Ohio
excerpt: Firelands United opened the 2026 men’s season with a 2-2 draw against Fut Ohio in the club’s first match at historic Strobel Field.

title: Firelands United Welcomes Fisher-Titus as Main Jersey Sponsor
excerpt: Firelands United is proud to welcome Fisher-Titus as the club’s main jersey sponsor, with their name featured on the front of every men’s and women’s jersey.

title: Firelands United Welcomes Chris Schnell as Head Men’s Coach
excerpt: Firelands United enters its second men’s season with new head coach Chris Schnell, bringing a high-energy, fearless style as the club continues to grow on and off the field.

title: Amelia Chartrant Becomes the First Woman to Sign in Firelands United History
excerpt: Amelia Chartrant’s signing marks a historic moment for Firelands United as the club’s first women’s player and a major step forward for the growth of the game in the Firelands.

title: Firelands United Launches Women’s First Team for 2026 Season
excerpt: We're excited to bring women's competitive, minor league soccer to the Firelands Region of Ohio. Want to join the Lands? Submit your interest form.

title: Firelands United Signs First Player in Club History
excerpt: Meet Connor Hauger, the first player in history to sign for the club.

title: Firelands United to Join NOSL Northwest
excerpt: We're excited to be joining the Northern Ohio Soccer League Northwest to help grow the beautiful game in Northern Ohio!

title: Join Firelands United for Our Summer Season
excerpt: Think you have what it takes to play minor league soccer? Submit your info to join the hottest team in Northern Ohio.
